reviews.review_text:
I loved this game so much and it pains me to leave a negative review, but after Hopoo sold the IP this game went down the ♥♥♥♥♥♥♥.  For someone like me who plays a lot of multiplayer, there has been a lot of latency issues or desync during play sessions. Gearbox seems to not give care as evident by the fact this is a 2 year old issue. 

If you dont care about multiplayer this is a great game that was given to a lazy company. ♥♥♥♥ you Gearbox!
The progression of feeling unstoppable to suddenly dying within a few seconds is addicting. 10/10
I've mostly played it solo, but it's even better with friends. Just a small warning: never and I mean NEVER listen when they tell you to gamble.

[h1]An absolute peak game[/h1]

With insane bosses, cool survivor mechanics, and incredible maps, every playthrough feels different with a completely different build. And don't even get me started on the music. Chris is just built different. Whatever genre of metal it is, it's just pure badass. Honestly, all the DLCs are badass too, no cap.

[h1]10/10[h1]

Absolutely incredible game. Genre defining peak, up there with Spire and Hades in the roguelike hall of fame. Endless build variety and replayability, and loads of characters and multiple modes offer a play style for anybody. Bored after hundreds of hours? Don't worry! Go check out the MASSIVE modding scene.
I started playing this game 2 days ago and already have 21+ hours on it, pretty safe to say that I think it's a good game. 🥹
super fun co-op game to play wth friends and a good excuse to yell at them if u want to

I love the game but I'm having an issue where I'm playing with my friends and after an hour in the game they keep getting kicked out and the run just breaks. I want to give it a 👍but I wanted to reach out to report the bug but I couldn't find a button to report the bug directly to the developers. It's not my internet connection because i've never lost connection and were all playing on the same network.

After playing 10 runs, I realized that the core gameplay loop is not really for me. The game feels too repetitive and time-consuming, and even with quality-of-life mods, I didn’t enjoy the pacing or progression enough to continue playing.

The game is not broken, it just didn’t match my expectations or personal taste.

Great gameplay loop with lots of build variety, probably the most fun I've had with roguelites. 

The vibes really carry this one.

good game, i love it when all i see is colors flashing in to my face, i also love the the builds you can do but my only issue is the music, whenever i hear the music I JUST WANT TO TURN IT ALL THE WAY UP!
a deity trapped on the moon by his brother vs a guy with 2 pistols on copious amounts of drugs and coffee: the game
Amazing game I have never had my ears tickled more by sounds while vibing to a game.

This game just diddles the autistic parts of my brain. Every enemy and boss gives me a handjob to doom. Me and acrid try to bust it away yet they crush my ?!?@. I get overstimulated very easily and I walk up thinking im homelander about suck some !>@#!. The game is really fun tho and I suggest it for any person who is normal!
Very fun, a lot of replayability and enjoyable achievement hunting! 10/10
В дождливый день... меня однажды спросили, про боль... про любовь и ненависть, я не мог точно сказать что это было... но это было нечто

I started a run "just to pass the time" at 8 PM. It is now 3 AM. I have 57 syringes, my movement speed is bordering on a psychological hazard, and my screen is just a blinding flash of proc coefficients and white noise. I don't know what I'm killing anymore, I just know that if I stop moving for 0.5 seconds, my health bar will instantly evaporate.

This is it, this is RISK OF RAIN 2. Probably the greatest roguelike game out there. You just can't get enough of it!
Infinite Replay ability and builds for everyone, Challenges are also fun

Feels like almost every enemy from the alloyed collective has a personal vendetta towards you having any fun playing melee characters, everything bursts damage so high that you pretty much turn to dust before anything you have procs.

This was an incredible game... keyword **was**. After the game was sold to gearbox, there hasn't been a single run that didn't include some sort of game-breaking bug. If i could rollback DLC 2 and 3, I would. Alas, the fact that multiplayer is a laggy and buggy mess has ruined one of the core elements of this game. Even the vibe of the game is entirely different, now feeling like a poorly modded session you're forced to play because the base game is gone. 
♥♥♥♥ you, Gearbox.
Great game. Big fan of colors and numbers.
top 5 soundtracks of all time, lore is incredible, gameplay, visual designs, all of it is amazing

One of the best roguelite, the unlimited stacks items made it standout, 3D world made a huge improvement to the gameplay if we compare to Risk of Rain 1. 
Each characters have their own uniqueness, unlimited choices to build, fun to play co-op, especially there's some game modifier using Artifact so the NG+ will still repeatable and playable over and over.

This game is wonderful and I love it, possibly one of my favorite games of all time. so why do I not recommend it. 

Through its many updates what used to be what I considered the single most polished roguelike experience has become….just ok

If they stopped updating after survivors of the void this would be an 11/10 game

I like the content that’s been added by gearbox but it comes with this weird feeling of them needing to pump out more content so the game bring in more revenue. Unfortunately for this player by trying to add to perfection you’re just watering down the experience

…I want to recommend this game so badly but this feeling just won’t go away, if it does I’ll change my vote

My friend told me to get it , so I did , and a few moments later I put on 75 sunglasses and beat up a crab 

cool 5/5

i just realized i have almost 40 hours

if you are doubting buying this game... Buy it. 
Trust me on this one, I was being annoyed by a friend of mine about how i should play this, then i bought it without any high hopes, and now i love it.
the art designer did a ♥♥♥♥ job cuz i can barley identify what the items in my inventory are. but i like the sfx overpowering the music at times 10/10

it has huntress

also if you're trying to find the teleporter just look for a spiky stage looking thing

Just buy this game. Infinitely replayable, fun to learn, doesn't get boring even after you've completed everything and your friends can hop in too. Also it's heavily moddable and your friends can play with you so long as both of you have the same mods installed.
10/10 game, would recommend, good content, DLc, take all my money
great game, hard and challenging yet so fun, bandit is overpowered, not much else to say, 10/10 would recommend for people who want a challenge
Very fun to play with friends online. Lots of content. Well worth the $8 I payed for it.
The greatest rougelike oat and its a immediate favorite no matter what your skill level or expierence with rougelikes are
I spent 3 hours on a single run and then was one shot by a child because I paused to take a bite of a burrito, 10/10 game can't wait to play until the day I die

Shoot, Die, Repeat !

Great musics, enjoyable gameplay especially with the artefact that let you chose your items. Lot of funs.

RoR 2 is my introduction to the RoR series and so far I've only been playing in single player due to none of my friends also owning this game, but I'll give my review of the game after playing for 2 hrs.

Positives:

Unique atmosphere
Very fitting soundtrack
Cool Characters
Unique gimmicks
Pretty cheap of a game if you get it on sale
Has multiplayer
DLC's
Seems to be nicely optimized (I'm no expert in optimization tho)

Negitives:

No real tutorial, although I probably should've expected that due to this probably being a sequel
Game is pretty hard for your first 5 or more playthru's
Definitely takes some time to get use to the game

Overall, I'd give it a 8/10 as of now. I definitely would suggest buying this game and giving it a try, especially with friends!

(I may edit this review and change some things if I decide I want to change it or just because I have more things to say later on)
oh waiter! yes, one more crippling addiction please. yes, thank you, this game will do quite well!

Risk of Rain 2 might be one of the greatest games that I've ever played. I had heard some good things about it and decided to buy it because it was on sale recently. It feels like I scammed the developers, this game is amazing and it's definitely worth the price.
10/10 One of, if not, the best rougelite I've ever played. Even better experience with friends. Well worth the price of entry.

ABSURDLY fun, infinite replayability cuz theres A) a f*** ton of characters B) a f*** ton of items C) a f*** ton of artifacts (unlockables that make major alterations like the artifact of command letting you pick items or sacrifice requiring kills for items to spawn) and D) YOU CAN PLAY IT WITH FRIENDS!!!!!!!!
this game is weally cool and I wike it awot, no but joked aside overall one of the best indie games out there and definitely worth playing if you're interested in playing rouge likes
fun game + music blows my balls off + the graphics are pretty + good looping mechanic + I will never tire of it + i will never escape it
Sick game. Heaps of different levels and things to unlock.

One of the best games I've played this year.

At first, playing this game seemed like another game where you play as a hero, shooting monsters and getting through stages. While it is, it is also entirely different because of a single factor. RNG (Random Number Generator" completely reframes the way I saw this game. The very concept of randomness. It shapes how good or bad your run will be based on partly how lucky you are. It is such a simple yet fun concept. While your run isn't entirely reliant on your luck, it still is such a huge factor and I'm so glad this is a core mechanic of the game. It makes the game look less tedious and more "random".

As you spawn into your game. You don't know what items you're gonna get, what bosses you're gonna fight, and how lucky you're going to get. For me, this translates perfectly to life. You're born into the unknown world. You don't know what friends you're going to have, what struggles you're going to face, and how you're going to get along. Only thing that matters is how you're going to handle them. My point is, just like in the game even when you have ♥♥♥♥ items it's not the end of your run. You have duplicators, scrappers, and more importantly, You. You are the final line of defense against all odds. The final say whether you want to scrap the item you have or not. You are meant to face obstacles, go through hardships, fight the biggest challenges. It's what makes you, you.

If you need to take time in a stage to get all the loot, drones, and whatnot. Then take your time. But, don't take too much :)

I hope this reaches the audience who needs this. 

Oh and btw, 10/10 game.
The only game, that can suprise you by making you feel like you broke the game and hit the limit just to see some even more ♥♥♥♥♥♥ run next time
Risk of rain 2 is a very nice game it might get repetitive in the 3-5 hours playtime but trust me continue to 10 or 20 hours and the game will gain its taste back

My favorite rogue like game. There is so much to do and you can make your runs different every single time. You can unlock a skill for a character, just have fun, or try to make a certain build. It can get very chaotic to the point where you don't even know what's happening, but that's the fun part. Every character offers something new (My personal favorites are Loader and Railgunner), and you can have fun with whoever you choose. I would say the only 2 downsides are subjective as in it can be boring and uneventful at first, and I don't find it as enjoyable without friends. Overall though, this game is amazing and is worth the money.

Every run in Risk of Rain 2 feels rewarding. Dying late into your run is rough, but never enough to keep you from one more run.

Understanding the world isn't integral to your experience with the game, but there's plenty of interesting, funny and beautiful entries to be found in the Logbook if you're keen. 

The DLCs add some of my favourite characters and items which I couldn't imagine the game without. Just keep a close eye on the next one, as there's a mixed track record of quality on release.

There's so much room to adapt and modify the game for their skill level, that most people could find a ruleset perfect for them. It's a game you really could play forever.
god i SUCK AT THIS GAME but its so FUN i ragequit and come back to it 15 minutes later its so peak bruh

I love this game so much, and ive never done this but i think this game deserves a 10/10
The sound track 10/10
The gameplay 10/10
And all round 10/10
The people complaining about the game not getting free updates and just dlcs. To this i say, the game is finished, its just addes content and 21 is kinda expsive but compared to prices of dlcs now it aint much.
best game ever i put so many hours into it  and still unlocking stuff best game ever
its a very rouge like game and its peak I like it the art is peak and the game play is hard if you want it to be hard or easy if you want it to be easy:>
Ror2 players when you havent spent an additional 60 dollars to make the game semi playable
This game is such a masterpiece, the only thing I regret is not buying it sooner. I'm looking forward to more content and I'll be surely buying the future DLC's

Amazing game to play, I love being able to press one button do a ton of dmg. But at the cost I get hit once and then I die. A lot of content to play through and honestly with just one of the dlcs it adds even more to do. Overall, 9/10 game.

less then 100 hours and im hooked, if you liked the binding of isaac then u will love this. with this game still getting love its more then worth it to play it whist this is happening. one of the best rouge likes by farrrrrr.

This game is amazing. I've only played it for 6 hours, but it is amazing. The music inside the game is very good, and brings a sort of alien type vibe while also being relaxing. There is a variety of characters to choose from, and a bunch of upgrades, so it's near impossible for the game to be repetitive, and there is always something unique about each run. The game is also challenging, but not impossible, as to where it is fun. I've just beaten the game for the first time, and it was very hard, and that was just easy mode. Please play this game if you like games about destroying monsters and becoming more powerful, I recommend this heavily, 10/10.

peak rougelite, amazing visuals and runs on low quailty hardware.
10/10 would recomend
Worth buying just for the soundtrack. Some of the unlocks make me want to gouge my eyes out and chomp off my fingers like baby carrots. Still a goated game.
fun and unique. lots of content and i actually am enjoying trying to 100% it.
Love the Lore, Gameplay, Scenery. Everything. its a Neat and fun game! i recommend if you are bored and wanna play a game for fun or with friends, this game is 100% a game to try <3
BEST CO-OP game with friends! Can also solo and fun especially the DLC's!

Fun with or without the DLC, but if you love the base game, the DLC is 100% worth the money.
Everything about this game is beautiful... The music is perfect and the art stlye is really really kool.
Great game. Very creative. Good soundtrack. Solid gameplay. 4 turning things into snakes out of 5 (4/5*).
Extraordinarily fun to play with friends. Although loot is not shared and there's a limited amount of it per area it never feels like anyone falls too far behind.
Great game with a steep learning curve but so rewarding once you understand it
peak game but paying for more characters is not for my wallet (bought`em all anyways)

Pros:
- Smooth gameplay
- Great story
- Replayable
- Incredible art
Cons:
- Idk

Overall, Risk of Rain 2 is an incredible roguelike, with new adventure in every area you traverse.
[h2] THIS GAME IS... [/h2]
peak
Great game 23 hours to liitle. Barely unlocked half the charcaters in the base game an dos many dlc so much content. Would recomend to most people. ALso the discounts are crazy

even tho the power fantasy of being these random characters and what they can do is cool. the mix of things to get makes runs different i get it. but i feel like the difficulty just being that of them doing more damage to you and you do less to them over time then you get one shot. with no sense of real progression becomes stale fast.

My soon-to-be girlfriend and I have been playing this game for 2 hours straight, and I'd like to say the game is fun, simple, and addictive. Above all, I got to play with a person who I cherish dearly!!!
Addicting and fun. Great with friends. Achievements are fun to get and most of the dlc is good also

This game is definitely a fun game. It has a ton of replayability and every run feels different. It has unique characters with different skill sets for everyone to use. The game can start off pretty simple, but as you get into it, you can make it more complex. The mobs and bosses are fun to go against, even if they give you a challenge. Overall, this game is definitely a good, with fast paced fights and events. It's definitely worth checking out and is even better if you have friends to play with.

This game is a 10/10. you can play by yourself and have infinite possible combinations of items leading to game breaking gameplay. if you think that the game is too easy, turn on the modifiers. if you think that its to hard then turn the game on mode or use the modifiers that make the game 10x easier. It has multiplayer so you can play with all of your friends and break the game together. The drones in this game might be a little stupid but that just makes the game more fun. I would personally recommend this game to anyone who doesn't like repetitive gameplay and/or  is looking for a new game to play with friends. This game is a hidden gem that i personally think doesn't get enough attention. it is a somewhat cheap game that will almost never repeat the same gameplay, it has too many bosses for me to count, it is multiplayer, and if you get tired of the maps, then you can get the 3(soon to be 4) DLC's that add new maps, enemies, bosses, and characters to play as. 

This game is peak cinema.
This game is awesome. Best gameplay loop around. (haha get it). Seriously though tons of amazing content and the DLCs are peak.
Divertido para jogar sozinho, com amigos geralmente é uma merda porque são todos cariocas com os itens no mapa.
good game has kept me entertained. Worth the install if you like roguelikes

It is not news that Gearbox tore the game down with Seekers of the Storm, even went as far as to copy modded characters and make them arguably worse.

The game's fun, the first DLC is fun.

You can get away with not buying Seekers of the Storm

Alloyed Collective is fine again, but I believe, full well, that it was saved by all the modders trying to make it good. You know damn well they were fighting Gearbox.

I have no hope for the next DLC.

Fun filled mob looter-shooter with colourful characters, tons of unique modifiers and a frenetic pace.

Maps can be a little empty sometimes, which makes playing slower characters a chore.

Overall, very enjoyable.
Super addicting rouge-like that's perfect for you and a friend that your secretly in love with to play late at night whenever everyone else is asleep.
elite game to play with friends and the dlcs are goated too, just wait to buy them when they are on sale
This game really introduce me on how to make a fun items for your survivors to progress and how each survivors have unique playstyles. Plus the OST is super bangers to listen.
This is just another fun time-killer. Maybe one day I'll have the time to 100%, but it's pretty difficult.

There is a distant possibility that there might be a metereological inconvenient such as thousands and thousands of water droplets precipitating from cumulonembuses and/or other steam conglomerations that form very high in the sky. 

There might also be a chance that this as happened before, thus this would be the second iteration of this phenomenon.
This game just scratches that itch that few other games can manage. It's equal parts "turn off your brain" and "we are done if we don't play this right".
very fun with friends and alone, soundtrack banger too
fun rpg very addicting great moding community.
This is one of my favorite roguelike games of all time. I just can't stop playing! The music is simply superb, and I constantly hum the tunes IRL.
very very fun game took years to finally convince me to buy ive loved every second of it so far

very fun game its great by yourself when you have nothing else to do but its even better with freinds and the dlcs are worth it aswell overall an amazing game

It's extremely fun and addicting. Hardest music of all time, extensive lore if you'd like to delve into it, and infinite replayability. You are the boss the enemies are trying to take down. There's nothing more you could ask for.
Chaotic game. Hurts your eyes and brain just from it. 10/10 would play this with no lights on.

I was wondering around about games that I should try or play and then I came across Risk of Rain 2 with a huge discount. For the price and trailer the game seems interesting to play so I bought it. For me the game offers a lot of variety in gameplay style, based on the class and on the items you pick. Overall really great game to play alone or with friends because it is not too easy but still enjoyable enough to play. Also even though its roguelike it is not boring because every session have a lot of different encounters and there is a lot of combo you can try.

i got this game to play it with my friends and DAMN i enjoy this game SO MUCH. i can already tell im going to spend so much more time on this game, especially when hallowed concepts drops. rlly fun 3d shooter roguehlight
graphics r amazing and i can play sorta smoothly in low graphic settings

and his brother loved worms

it is perfect game for good team

*note* buy ever DLC if you can 
it make game more crazy [ you feel like  god ]

Base game has great music, characters, items, and overall gameplay. Plenty to unlock and achieve. One of the best roguelike experiences out there.

With the expansions, this game goes from great to exceptional. Expansions add new characters, items, endings, vastly improving an already amazing game. Wait for a sale as usual, but this game is worth it regardless,

Great game. Very addicting.









Lol, you thought there would be something else here didn't you?

best played with other noobs in discord while drinking and screaming at each other about the weird things. go in all the portals go die in weird ways for 15  hours its a BLAST also for less unhinged introduction and less confusion theres a good assortment of youtube videos.
Very fun. Would recommend a couple of mods as the base game is slightly slow. But even base game is fun as you learn the game and understand all the items, places, enemies, and what not.
